title: Day 24: Day 24 — Team Recruiting
content:
# Day 24 — Team Recruiting

## Topic
Turning your existing people into a recruiting engine

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Top agents can help recruit:** Strong performers often know other strong performers and can open warmer doors than cold outreach.
- **Referral incentives create motion:** A simple, clear reward can encourage introductions without making the process weird.
- **Build a recruiting culture:** Recruiting should not live with one person alone; the brokerage should treat talent attraction as everyone’s job.
- **Give the team a message to share:** If your agents can’t explain why someone should join, you don’t really have a scalable recruiting story.
- **Keep the process organized:** Referrals need follow-up, tracking, and ownership so opportunities don’t die in chaos.

## Why It Matters
Team recruiting scales faster than founder-only recruiting. When your people actively help attract talent, your pipeline gets warmer, trust improves, and growth becomes much more repeatable.
